messages.message: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic here. It's been 5 months since your last visit. 2 slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 + complimentary fluoride. Your 6-month cleaning recall is due now. I can hold the slot that suits you. Reply 1 for the first slot or 2 for the second.
messages.cta: Reply 1 for the first slot or 2 for the second.
